title: How to Make Your AI Agents Work Better (With Context Hygiene)
summary: Jordan Urbs presents context hygiene as a three-layer framework for maintaining AI agent state and behavior across conversations. The approach uses skills, harnesses, and hygiene practices to prevent context loss and enable multi-agent orchestration, demonstrated through a production content pipeline that automates researchers, writers, designers, and reviewers.
